null_handling: Null → DSRI=NaN → m_score omitted if >2 core components null
known_edge_cases: ifrs-full_TradeAndOtherCurrentReceivables sometimes maps to 기타수취채권 (other receivables) not trade receivables — lower priority than dart_ShortTermTradeReceivable

formula_role: DSRI denominator; GMI via gross margin; SGI; SGAI denominator
null_handling: Null → most ratios NaN; company-year excluded if revenue=0 or null
known_edge_cases: Some companies report under IFRS 15 element (RevenueFromContractsWithCustomers); others under legacy Revenue — both checked

null_handling: Null when expense_method=nature; GMI set to 1.0
known_edge_cases: Nature-of-expense filers do not report cogs as a separate line — missing is expected not anomalous; ~19% exclusion rate in Asian markets per GMT Research

null_handling: Null when expense_method=nature; SGAI set to 1.0
known_edge_cases: dart_TotalSellingGeneralAdministrativeExpenses confirmed as primary empirically (Feb 2026); ifrs-full element is tertiary fallback

formula_role: DEPI via (depreciation / (ppe + depreciation)); AQI soft_assets = total_assets - ppe
known_edge_cases: Net book value (after accumulated depreciation) — correct for DEPI formula

Must be extracted from CF statement (sj_div=CF) not IS; nature-method filers may report depreciation on IS under different line — that figure must NOT be used; 유형자산상각비 used by non-standard filers (confirmed empirically Feb 2026)

formula_role: AQI denominator; LVGI denominator; TATA denominator
null_handling: Null → m_score NaN; total_assets=0 replaced with NaN to avoid division by zero
known_edge_cases: Balance sheet total — always present in DART XBRL for active companies

null_handling: Null → LVGI=NaN → LVGI.fillna(1.0) in m_score computation
known_edge_cases: DO NOT use ifrs-full:NoncurrentPortionOfLongtermBorrowings — does not exist in DART XBRL (confirmed empirically OQ-E Feb 2026). DO NOT use 비유동부채 (all non-current liabilities — far too broad; inflates LVGI). Three-tier chain: dart_LongTermBorrowingsGross (primary) → dart_BondsIssued (secondary; corporate bonds; add to numerator if borrowings absent) → null

null_handling: Null → TATA=NaN → TATA.fillna(0.0) in m_score computation
known_edge_cases: Profit or loss attributable to owners of parent in CFS; includes minority interest in some filings — use consolidated figure

null_handling: Null → TATA=NaN → TATA.fillna(0.0) in m_score computation
known_edge_cases: Extracted from CF statement (sj_div=CF); indirect method and direct method companies both use the same top-line element; negative CFO is valid (cash-burning companies)
